**Описание:**
Масаки — бывшая участница популярной группы ньютуберов Harikiri Sisters. Всё у неё было прекрасно, пока её не уволили прямо в ходе стрима. Однако всё меняется, когда Масаки встречает Лайв — вампиршу со сверхспособностями, которая становится её напарницей. Вместе они собираются пилить крутейший контент и заполучить миллион подписчиков... Правда, у вампирши тут есть свой гастрономический интерес.

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 33+34 2024 (Digital) (Rillant)
description:
x1378 native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/). 
Spreads joined, otherwise untouched.

**Note:** Thank Chair chapter 47 now includes part 3.

General info:
* "Why don't you rip X series? Chapter Y of series X already released, where is it?" These rips are purely the series I and JDS personally buy to read for ourselves as well as some series that have the second-most recent chapter available for free. That means that if a K Manga series is not included in these batches, we either don't buy/read it or it doesn't have recent free chapters.
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening except for weeks when a Witch Hat Atelier chapter releases, then the upload is on Wednesday.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* If you want to add your purchases to these batches to share with others, let me know!
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

description:
#### 2x Upscale of **Freesia v01-12 by Jiro Matsumoto**

***Freesia is set in an alternative Japanese society that is at war, and has passed a law legalizing retaliatory killings. If somebody kills your loved one, you are legally sanctioned to kill, or hire someone to kill, the victimizer. The manga is set around a character who works for a firm that specializes in these retaliatory killings.***

title: 18x2 Beyond Youthful Days 2024 720p NF WEB-DL H.265
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/q11B58D.jpeg)

**Summary :** Ami, a backpacker from Japan who is four years older than high school student Jimmy, shows up at his part-time job. The two end up spending the summer working at the same store, but Jimmy gradually develops a faint crush on Ami. The two of them grew closer as they rode motorcycles together at night and went to the movies, but suddenly, Ami decided to return to Japan. Ami proposes her “one promise” to Jimmy, who can’t sort out his feelings. As time passes, Jimmy visits his parents’ house for the first time in a while and finds a postcard that Ami sent him 18 years ago when she returned to Japan. Jimmy’s memories of his first love come back to him, and he takes his first solo trip to Japan to confront his past and examine his present. Jimmy rides the train while listening to songs that remind him of his memories with Ami, and he heads to her hometown. Will Jimmy be able to reunite with Ami?

title: [VCB-Studio] 秒杀外挂太强了，异世界的家伙们根本就不是对手。 / Sokushi Cheat ga Saikyou Sugite, Isekai no Yatsura ga Marude Aite ni Naranaindesu ga. / 即死チートが最強すぎて、異世界のやつらがまるで相手にならないんですが。 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Fin]
description:
![](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/08/17/9912402a3b0a32b311787645a5fb92d1_800.webp)

秒杀外挂太强了，异世界的家伙们根本就不是对手。 BDRip
Sokushi Cheat ga Saikyou Sugite, Isekai no Yatsura ga Marude Aite ni Naranaindesu ga. BDRip
即死チートが最強すぎて、異世界のやつらがまるで相手にならないんですが。 BDRip

部分剧集内封评论音轨。
Some episodes contain commentary tracks.

原盘画质一般。作画还算过得去，不过线条锐度略有不足，并伴有较强的锯齿；平面上还加了过量的动噪，虽然几乎没色带，但实际画面多少有点欠码。因此整体观感并不算太好。问题比较大的是 OP，使用了原盘编码无法承受的特效强度，严重的欠码问题导致部分画面有明显的马赛克瑕疵（DCT Pattern），另外线条还有相当严重的振铃。我们比对了 Amazon 源的 OP，情况略好一些，没有明显的马赛克问题，但线条细节溃烂。考虑到原盘马赛克太强，直接处理虽然能消除但画面损失较大；Amazon 源线条质量太差，不适合直接处理。权衡之下，我们对原盘和 Amazon 源的 OP 画面进行了融合，以一部分线条损失为代价，改善了马赛克问题，随后再辅以较强的去振铃修复线条。最后和正片一起进行整体处理：去色带、抗锯齿、适度线条加深、较强的时域降噪。
The quality of this BD is average. The sakuga is okay, but the lines aren’t very sharp, with strong aliasing. Excessive dynamic noise can be observed on flat areas. While there are few banding issues, the overall image suffers from a lack of bitrate, making the viewing experience less than ideal. The biggest issue is with the opening (OP), where the special effects overwhelm the disc’s encoding, causing noticeable DCT patterns and severe ringing in the lines. We compared this with the OP from the Amazon Prime Video. While it doesn’t have DCT patterns, the line details are badly degraded. Considering that using only the BD would remove the DCT patterns but cause significant detail loss, and the Prime Video version isn’t good enough on its own, we ultimately decided to merge the OP footage from both sources, trading some line details to eliminate the DCT patterns. We then applied strong de-ringing to improve the lines. Finally, we processed the entire video, including the main content, with debanding, anti-aliasing, moderate line sharpening, and strong temporal denoising.

发布：剧情很欢乐，但是看不太懂。美少女很多，但是死得很快。期待下一期。 10/10

title: [Tracksuit] Sand Land (2003) (Kanzenban 10K Ultra HQ)
description:
![alt text](https://i.postimg.cc/T3KBMgsM/image.png "who even is this man")

Toriyama’s now-popular Sand Land, brought to life with an ultra high quality scan, complete in English! No more low resolution digital version, no more missing color pages! This scan (which uses the Kanzenban version as its source) also includes the two bonus sections: a Toriyama Q&A, and a Toriyama sketches and concept art section – never before translated, as best I can find! 

### **Contents:**
**Source:** Japanese Sand Land Kanzenban Release (scanned at 6780 x 9760)
**Translation:** Viz Translation
**Sound Effects:** All SFX were left in Japanese, as they are all self evident onomatopoeia
**Toriyama Q&A Section:** Translated by SaiyaJedi over on Kanzenshuu
**Toriyama Sketches Section:** Brand new never-before-seen translation by the Tracksuit team

### **Smaller Version:**
This specific torrent is ridiculously big. 6780 x 9760 is an insane resolution, and only really valuable to editors and archivists (or anyone, like us, that just loves to zoom in on Toriyama art without things getting blurry).  

If you are not one of those, and want this lovely release at a more reasonable size (but still plenty high quality), head [here](https://nyaa.si/view/1862186) for the 4K Down res release. It still looks fantastic, and worlds better than any release before now!


[Here is a comparison](https://slow.pics/c/HCwWDwpd?image-fit=contain) between the two versions, for those curious.


Enjoy!

title: Tico and Friends (1994, subs only for ATTKC)
description:
These are soft subs for

### Nanatsu no Umi no Tico ###
https://anidb.net/anime/2288

Translation was done by MJN (EP 1 -16) and nezumi/ManuelLink (EP 17 - 39) -> from here: https://nyaa.si/view/901002

I used the following source: https://nyaa.si/view/992752

Remarks:
* The subs from EP 17 onwards were quite tiresome to work on. I tried my best with timing and forming sometimes proper English sentences.
* Punctuation was another motivation killer. OCRing a good sub is more rewarding.

Subs are also here: https://mega.nz/folder/cdJzkKaB#6kojmmzHiQEMCwr9CCaMLA

title: [4de] DEAD DEAD DEMONS DEDEDEDE DESTRUCTION - S01E12 (WEB 1080p) [Dual Audio]
description:
## What is this?
The CR release of this show has a ~~nice~~ ~~fine~~ script but it has weird technical issues-- Everything is timed to the dub audio and the script is *full* of linebreaks.
Also, all of the signs are hardsubbed. There are some seriously cool signs that only an official publisher would be able to do (the title cards/location names) and straight up Arial-with-stroke signs.

The script is fully retimed and ~~lightly~~ edited. [Here's a script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/JQHdlQQn/). The diff doesn't include all of the strange linebreaks that were removed.

All of the Arial signs were dehardsubbed, and the important ones were recreated in ASS.
We also included the dub and a signs track if that's what you're into.

We're planning to keep up with this show as long as CR's timing is distractingly bad.

[MediaInfo](https://pastebin.com/raw/NuJiKPZi)

## Credits
Translation: Ocean Productions  
Editing/Timing/TS: Henry  
Encode: sgt  
Song TL: chron  
Lyrics: Ridley  
KFX: Zahuczky  
QC: Henry, sgt

description:
I have compiled the chapters into the volumes added covers and deleted credit pages. 

#### Synopsis ####
”Is it okay to kill people?" A treacherous revenge suspense by Shiryu Nakatake, a newcomer to Bessatsu Shonen Magazine."Shun, if someone is converted, let him go and do nothing. He should be given a chance to be reborn." "Grandpa, I hope he doesn't reincarnate himself." In order to defeat several non-human monsters, the boy also became something non-human.Shin Uruma, a sixth-grade student, was named "Experimental body: A" by five of his classmates and was severely bullied and lived in hell. His only peace was with his brother, who loved him, and his parents, who protected him. until the five monsters killed his family. When he finally loses everything and faces true hell, a dark "wish" is born inside Shun. He was reborn under the training of his grandfather, who served in a secret unit during WWII. Now, four years later, he appears in front of his fated enemy. "I won't let ANYONE get in the way of my revenge."

title: Soulmate Adventure - Feng Ling Yu Xiu S1
description:
It is rumored in the martial world that a mystery white-haired girl suddenly appeared around the thief Feng Ling Er. She is so powerful that many martial arts masters can't defeat her. The girl's identity, the source of her power and her influence to the world all caused discussion among the public. But Feng Ling Er and the white-haired girl named Bai Yu Xiu never care about it. They travel the world with pleasure, unaware of a great conspiracy coming towards them. 

This release has the raw files along with .srt files that have the English subtitles (courtesy of [GM-Team]). Your media player should see that they have the same name as the episode they're referring to and automagically show the subtitles.

***

**Isekai Suicide Squad | 異世界スーサイド・スクワッド | Отряд самоубийц: Исекай | Отряд самоубийц из другого мира [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** приключения, фэнтези
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 10 из 10
**Дата выпуска:** c 10.04.2024 по 26.06.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Wit Studio](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=17322)
**Режиссер:** [Осада Эри](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=559188)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11812), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=28894), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18098), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/55848), [Сетка вещания](https://cal.syoboi.jp/tid/7105/time)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://dreamerscast.com/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Дубляжная](https://vk.com/dublyajnaya)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Amazing Dubbing](https://amazingdubbing.ru/)
**Перевод  #4:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Перевод  #5:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [SHIZA Project](https://shiza-project.com)
**Перевод  #6:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniBaza](https://t.me/Ani_Baza)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские, Multi-5 (софтсаб) | AniLibria.TV, AMZN

**Описание:**
В разъедаемом преступностью Готэме Аманда Уоллер, глава организации A.R.G.U.S., собрала отряд известных супер-преступников ради особой миссии. Харли Квинн, Дэдшот, Миротворец, Глиноликий и Король Акул отправляться через загадочные врата в другой мир — царство меча и магии, орков и драконов. В шеи бойцам вшита взрывчатка, так что сбежать или отказаться они не могут, а провал будет означать мгновенную смерть.

**Качество видео:** WEBRip (AMZN)
**Формат:** mkv
**Видео кодек:** x264
**Аудио кодек:** AAC, EAC3
**Видео:** AVC (High@L4), 1920x1080 (16:9), ~23.976 fps, ~7.6 Mb/s

title: The Transformers - The Movie (1986) [2021 BD remux] [ENG+JPN] V2
description:
V2 with new audio tracks and the English subs from Karyuudo Fansubs YT upload. Still uses the 4:3 Full Frame BD video from the 2021 release.

### Audio
| Description                                              | Format        | Source                                                                  |
| -------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| English 2.0ch Dolby Surround                             | FLAC 16-bit   | 2021 USA/UK UHD                                                         |
| English 2.0ch Dolby Surround international version ∗new∗ | FLAC 16-bit   | Multiple sources                                                        |
| English 5.1ch Surround remix ∗new∗                       | AC-3          | 2005 UK DVD                                                             |
| Japanese 2.0ch Dolby Surround ∗new∗                      | FLAC 16-bit   | [よし @ niconico](https://www.nicovideo.jp/user/8907941/mylist/18200057) |
| Japanese 2.0ch Mono                                      | AC-3          | 2001 JPN DVD                                                            |
| 2006 USA DVD staff commentary                            | AC-3          | 2021 USA/UK UHD                                                         |
| 2007 UK DVD commentary                                   | AC-3          | 2009 AUS BD                                                             |

The international version features narration during the opening titles and ending scene, and the removal of Spike's "Oh shit". Afaik all sources of the international version are in Mono, so the narration from the NLD DVD was isolated and blended in with RX10, and the Japanese Dolby Surround track was patched in to remove Spike's swearing.  

The 5.1 DTS-HD MA track was dropped because it appears to be an upmix of the Dolby Surround track. In its place I've included the controversial Magno Sound & Video 5.1 remix from the 2005 UK DVD for shits and giggles. 

The Japanese Dolby Surround track is sourced from よし's 11-part upload to niconico from 2010. A loud chirp has been repaired (listen to 05:14 - 05:16 in [part 3 on niconico](https://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm10097624)). I've also retimed the Japanese Mono track. 

No sound is supposed to be playing during the DEG and Sunbow/Marvel Productions idents, and so the idents are silent now. However, I left in the Sunbow/Marvel jingle in the UK DVD 5.1 remix due to its revisionist nature. In some releases, the DEG ident has the gong sound from the Rank Film Distributors ident on the UK print. 

### Subtitles
| Description                                 | Format | 
| ------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| English                                     | ASS    |
| English for international version           | ASS    |
| English for Japanese dub [Karyuudo Fansubs] | ASS    |
| English SDH (2021 USA/UK UHD)               | PGS    |
| Spanish LATAM (2021 USA/UK UHS)             | PGS    |    

The English subtitles for the Japanese dub were OCR'd from the [Karyuudo Fansubs YT upload](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wLUpS8QPOXE) and time shifted with Sushi. Hopefully caught all OCR errors. Aside from inserting the article *the* in one line and the removal of a misheard line (see 01:14:12 in the YT upload), nothing was changed. The subtitles could use TLC and extensive retiming, but as Ultra Magnus once said: *I can't deal with that now.*

---------------------------------------

For those who just want the main audio and subtitle tracks, [check #1862038](https://nyaa.si/view/1862038)

description:
[![](https://iili.io/dlgW2rg.png)](https://youtu.be/AITORu8MyU0)

---

**About**
A dual-audio remux consisting of Crunchyroll's video and audio (untouched), all Crunchyroll subs, restyled and resampled to 1080p English subs with ED from [Loser](https://nyaa.si/view/1849382) and OP from me, accurate complete named chapters, all (including missing from VARYG's release) necessary fonts, better default tagging for language preferences, and, of course, a signs & songs track.

I've retained Crunchyroll's Full and Forced subtitle tracks for you, since to resample their signs properly, I had to remove all blur from all of them, so they look a bit worse in my sub track compared to CR's (or better, depending on who you ask).

**Episode**
[「負けヒロインを覗く時、負けヒロインもまたあなたを覗いているのだ」](https://makeine-anime.com/story/?id=ep04)
[When You Stare Into a Losing Heroine, the Losing Heroine Stares Back Into You](https://thetvdb.com/series/make-heroine-ga-oosugiru/episodes/10535661)

**Video**
WEB-DL / x264 / 8 bit / 1080p / 8000 kbps / CR

**Audio**
#1 Japanese / Advanced Audio Codec Low Complexity (AAC LC) / 2.0 / 44.1 kHz / 128 kbps / CR
#2 English / Advanced Audio Codec Low Complexity (AAC LC) / 2.0 / 44.1 kHz / 128 kbps / CR

**Subtitles**
#1 English / Full / ASS / Muri
#2 English / Forced / ASS / Muri
#3 English / Full / ASS / CR
#4 English / Forced / ASS / CR
#5 Arabic (Saudi Arabia) / Full / ASS / CR
#6 French / Full / ASS / CR
#7 German / Full / ASS / CR
#8 Italian / Full / ASS / CR
#9 Portuguese (Brazil) / Full / ASS / CR
#10 Russian / Full / ASS / CR
#11 Spanish (European) / Full / ASS / CR
#12 Spanish (Latin American) / Full / ASS / CR

**Chapters**
Named / Muri

---

[![](https://iili.io/dMIjklt.jpg)](https://iili.io/dM76G8F.png)

---

**Notice**
It seems like because the ChromeCDM API is not working, ToonsHub aren't able to rip dual-audio AMZN rips of Crunchyroll anime. Thus, I am also unable to obtain the higher quality audio tracks from Amazon instead of Crunchyroll at the moment. It is unknown how long their API will not function, but I don't wanna delay the episode much further. I'll repack the release when the better audio becomes available. Hopefully this change isn't permanent, as the AMZN audio sounds noticeably better imo, and my Makeine releases will lose a pretty substantial edge & purpose over the regular dual-audio rips from VARYG or NanDesuKa.

**Sources**
Video / Audio / Subtitles / [VARYG](https://nyaa.si/view/1861272)
Images / [Top (Left)](https://twitter.com/imigimuru/status/1819765914654675217/photo/1) / [Top (Right)](https://twitter.com/makeine_anime/status/1819931263261941997/photo/1) / [Middle](https://makeine-anime.com/story/?id=ep04)

**Staff**

Song Styling / kef (ED) / Muri (OP)

四月一日灵异事件簿剧场版：仲夏夜之梦 / Gekijouban xxxHOLiC Manatsu no Yo no Yume / 劇場版 xxxHOLiC 真夏ノ夜ノ夢 BDRip  
  
外挂 FLAC 5.1。  
MKA contains FLAC 5.1.  

系列最早作，IG早期HD。以时代来说非常出色，但在细密的背景上有很多处润线不到位的线条锯齿，我们在二者中进行了取舍。  
This is the earliest work in the series, an early HD production by IG. For its time, it's outstanding, but there are many instances of aliasing on lines where the line smoothing was insufficient, especially on the detailed backgrounds. We had to make some trade-offs between the two.
